title: Require Blueprint Packet Topology
forbids: an open blueprint packet, a missing rule or baseline, or a runner source outside the canonical pattern.md, structure.toml, and exceptional check.mjs names
why: Every generic blueprint rule is one closed policy packet. Stable packet names let Habitat validate topology and keep any demonstrated native capability-gap adapter beside the rule it implements.
remediate: Keep rule.json and baseline.json in every blueprint packet, add only the selected pattern.md or structure.toml source, use check.mjs only for a documented Habitat capability gap, and remove unrelated files from the packet.
message: Blueprint packets must retain one closed canonical policy surface.
